testcase.name: test_pm_material_requests_endpoint
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_pm_dashboard.py:28: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"PM login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: PM login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_pm_labour_requests_endpoint
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_pm_dashboard.py:28: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"PM login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: PM login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_pm_dashboard.py:239: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
